THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETHRICK, MARCIA $4,779.94 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,805.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
